lines.english: O Nanak, the unstruck celestial melody vibrates for them. ||36||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿ ਰਾਖੀ ਗੁਰਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਤਜਿ ਪਰਪੰਚ ਮੋਹ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: pat raakhee gur paarabraham taj parapanch moh bikaar |
lines.english: The Guru, the Supreme Lord God, preserved my honor, when I renounced hypocrisy, emotional attachment and corruption.
They are filled and fulfilled with the Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord, the Treasure of sublime wealth;
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਊ ਆਰਾਧੀਐ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak soaoo aaraadheeai ant na paaraavaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, worship and adore the One, who has no end or limitation. ||1||
Pauree:
PAPPA: He is beyond estimation; His limits cannot be found.
He is the Purifier of sinners. Millions of sinners are purified;
The Sovereign Lord King is inaccessible;
they meet the Holy, and chant the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord.
by those who are protected by the Lord of the World.
Deception, fraud and emotional attachment are eliminated,
He is the Supreme King, with the royal canopy above His Head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਥਿਤ ਪਾਈ ਫਿਰਨ ਮਿਟੇ ਨਿਤ ਨੀਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak gur te thit paaee firan mitte nit neet |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, eternal stability is obtained from the Guru, and one's day-to-day wanderings cease. ||1||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਾਹੇ ਕਾਟੇ ਮਿਟੇ ਗਵਨ ਫਤਿਹ ਭਈ ਮਨਿ ਜੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: faahe kaatte mitte gavan fatih bhee man jeet |
lines.english: The noose of Death is cut, and one's wanderings cease; victory is obtained, when one conquers his own mind.
O Nanak, there is no other at all. ||37||
FAFFA: After wandering and wandering for so long, you have come;
in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, you have obtained this human body, so very difficult to obtain.
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਇਆ ਅਉਸਰੁ ਚਰੈ ਨ ਹਾਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: fir eaa aausar charai na haathaa |
lines.english: This opportunity shall not come into your hands again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵਨ ਜਾਨੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: fir fir aavan jaan na hoee |
lines.english: You shall not have to come and go in reincarnation over and over again,
So chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and the noose of Death shall be cut away.
and unite poor Nanak with Yourself. ||38||
Shower Your Mercy, O God, Creator Lord,
if you chant and meditate on the One and Only Lord.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਉ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਤੁਮ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਗੁਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: binau sunahu tum paarabraham deen deaal gupaal |
lines.english: Hear my prayer, O Supreme Lord God, Merciful to the meek, Lord of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸੰਪੈ ਬਹੁ ਭੋਗ ਰਸ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧ ਰਵਾਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sukh sanpai bahu bhog ras naanak saadh ravaal |1|
lines.english: The dust of the feet of the Holy is peace, wealth, great enjoyment and pleasure for Nanak. ||1||
Pauree:
A Vaishnaav is one who, as Gurmukh, lives the righteous life of Dharma.
BABBA: One who knows God is a Brahmin.
One who eradicates his own evil is a brave warrior;
The spiritually blind place the blame on others.
no evil even approaches him.
Man is bound by the chains of his own egotism, selfishness and conceit.
O Nanak, he alone comes to know, whom the Lord inspires to know. ||39||
Salok:
But all debates and clever tricks are of no use at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭੰਜਨ ਅਘ ਦੂਖ ਨਾਸ ਮਨਹਿ ਅਰਾਧਿ ਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bhanjan agh dookh naas maneh araadh hare |
lines.english: The Destroyer of fear, the Eradicator of sin and sorrow - enshrine that Lord in your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਸੰਗ ਜਿਹ ਰਿਦ ਬਸਿਓ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਨ ਭ੍ਰਮੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: santasang jih rid basio naanak te na bhrame |1|
lines.english: One whose heart abides in the Society of the Saints, O Nanak, does not wander around in doubt. ||1||
BHABHA: Cast out your doubt and delusion
Pauree:
The angelic beings, goddesses and gods are deluded by doubt.
this world is just a dream.
The Siddhas and seekers, and even Brahma are deluded by doubt.
Wandering around, deluded by doubt, people are ruined.
It is so very difficult and treacherous to cross over this ocean of Maya.
That Gurmukh who has eradicated doubt, fear and attachment,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਡੋਲੈ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧੀ ਮਨੁ ਲਪਟਿਓ ਤਿਹ ਸੰਗ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa ddolai bahu bidhee man lapattio tih sang |
lines.english: Maya clings to the mind, and causes it to waver in so many ways.
Salok:
O Nanak, obtains supreme peace. ||40||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਗਨ ਤੇ ਜਿਹ ਤੁਮ ਰਖਹੁ ਸੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਹਿ ਰੰਗ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: maagan te jih tum rakhahu su naanak naameh rang |1|
lines.english: When You, O Lord, restrain someone from asking for wealth, then, O Nanak, he comes to love the Name. ||1||
Pauree:
MAMMA: The beggar is so ignorant
Whenever you ask for something, you ask for worldly things;
the Great Giver continues to give. He is All-knowing.
O foolish mind, why do you complain, and cry out so loud?
Whatever He gives, He gives once and for all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੇ ਕੁਸਲ ਨ ਕਾਹੂ ਥੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaa te kusal na kaahoo theea |
lines.english: no one has obtained happiness from these.
O Nanak, by Him, you shall be saved. ||41||
If you must ask for a gift, then ask for the One Lord.
